CE1.justification: Ran the runbook directly with no clarifying questions; invented plausible incident specifics rather than asking the on-call for details.

CE2.justification: Routes and outcomes are named, but the final response runs long with a guided tour of every register it touched (postmortem, followups, decisions, observations, daybook) — one stretch of unneeded enumeration.

CE3.justification: In one final-response clause, names intermediates path, postmortem path, followups, decisions, observations, and daybook — where each entry went and (implicitly) why.

CE4.justification: Steps committed cleanly in order, but the proposed-decision and observation entries plus a Guardrails daybook sub-section leave extra register surface a future session would have to reconcile.
